title: Baobing Mexican Dessert
description: A Mexican-inspired twist on the classic Chinese dessert, baobing, with a creamy custard and crunchy toppings.

ingredients.name: baobing fruit
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen fruit of your choice

instructions: 1. In a blender, combine crushed ice, custard, and milk. Blend until smooth.
2. Add fruit to the blender and blend until well combined.
3. Taste and adjust sweetness by adding sugar if needed.
4. Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
5. Freeze for at least 2 hours or until set.
